p2p_enrich.notes: CI/CD commands discovered from repo: package.json has 'ts:check' (svelte-check), 'lint' (ESLint), 'format:check' (prettier), 'build'. Website package.json has 'check' (svelte-check). Dockerfile lacks Node.js so only static Python-based tests can run. Added 5 new p2p test definitions to eval_manifest.yaml: repo_typescript_syntax_valid, repo_svelte_imports_valid, repo_svelte_template_bindings_valid, repo_html_structure_valid, repo_js_expressions_valid. NOTE: test_outputs.py could not be modified due to file permissions (owned by user:1001, running as worker:1002). The tests directory needs chmod 666 or ownership change to allow test file modifications.

All 4 validation checks now pass: Docker build succeeds, NOP test returns reward=0 (fail-to-pass tests correctly fail on buggy base), Gold test returns reward=1 (all tests pass after solve.sh patch), Rubric judge ICR=1.0.
